entries.source: Our Policy on “Do Not Track” Signals:
entries.value: A nosa política sobre sinais “Do Not Track”:

entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: O noso Servizo permíteche publicar, ligar, almacenar, compartir e poñer dispoñible doutras maneiras certa información, texto, gráficos, vídeos ou outro material (“Contido”). Es responsable do Contido que publiques no Servizo ou a través del, incluíndo a súa legalidade, fiabilidade e adecuación. Porén, ao publicar Contido usando o Servizo concédesnos o dereito e a licenza para usar, modificar, executar publicamente, mostrar publicamente, reproducir e distribuír ese Contido no Servizo e a través del. Aceptas que esta licenza inclúe o dereito de facer que o teu Contido estea dispoñible para outros usuarios do Servizo, que tamén poderán usar o teu Contido suxeitos a estes Termos. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ten o dereito, pero non a obriga, de supervisar e editar todo o Contido proporcionado polos usuarios. Ademais, o Contido atopado no Servizo ou a través del é propiedade de Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ou úsase con permiso. Non podes distribuír, modificar, transmitir, reutilizar, descargar, volver publicar, copiar nin usar ese Contido, total ou parcialmente, con fins comerciais ou para beneficio persoal, sen permiso escrito previo e expreso da nosa parte.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

entries.source: Pages are designed to move people from explanation into a live mode, prompt, quiz, or review loop.
entries.value: As páxinas están deseñadas para levar a xente da explicación a un modo en vivo, prompt, cuestionario ou bucle de repaso.

entries.value: Combina tarxetas con comprensión

entries.source: Pair terms, definitions, causes, and examples
entries.value: Emparella termos, definicións, causas e exemplos

entries.source: Parents
entries.value: Pais

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: As familias adoitan intentar axudar sen tomar o control. inspir dá ás familias modos públicos que fan visible o comportamento de aprendizaxe: pistas, preguntas, explicación de volta, repaso e planificación de estudo.

entries.source: Parse the visual, identify relationships, explain uncertainty, and turn it into a learning step.
entries.value: Analiza o visual, identifica relacións, explica a incerteza e convérteo nun paso de aprendizaxe.

entries.source: Passport into a historical world
entries.value: Pasaporte a un mundo histórico

entries.source: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Pega unha pregunta, a túa resposta e a resposta esperada se a tes. O teu compañeiro explica o razoamento e axúdache a evitar o mesmo erro a próxima vez.

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Pega un pequeno anaco de notas en Flashcard Builder.

entries.source: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Pega datos, descricións de gráficos ou resultados e aprende que significan, que non significan e que preguntar a continuación.

entries.source: Paste notes or name the lesson
entries.value: Pega apuntamentos ou nomea a lección

entries.value: Pega ou describe a fonte

entries.source: Paste the data or describe the chart
entries.value: Pega os datos ou describe o gráfico

entries.source: Paste the question and what you have tried, then ask for the smallest useful next step.
entries.value: Pega a pregunta e o que probaches, e logo pide o seguinte paso útil máis pequeno.

entries.source: Paste the question and your answer
entries.value: Pega a pregunta e a túa resposta

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Pega a pregunta, o que intentaches e o punto no que estás bloqueado. Pide a pista útil máis pequena, non a resposta final.

entries.source: Paste the source details or URL information
entries.value: Pega os detalles da fonte ou a información do URL

entries.source: Paste the step you tried and ask whether the reasoning is valid before asking for the next move.
entries.value: Pega o paso que intentaches e pregunta se o razoamento é válido antes de pedir o seguinte movemento.

entries.value: Pega o texto para resumir

entries.source: Philosophy Lab
entries.value: Laboratorio de filosofía

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: O modo de aprendizaxe con IA Philosophy Lab é unha maneira centrada de usar a IA para aprender en vez de recoller respostas pasivamente. O modo está construído arredor dunha tarefa concreta: explorar identidade, coñecemento, xustiza, liberdade, felicidade e outras preguntas profundas mediante razoamento coidadoso.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Modo de aprendizaxe con IA Philosophy Lab: guía práctica

entries.source: Philosophy Lab prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts e bucle de estudo de Philosophy Lab

entries.source: philosophy tutor AI
entries.value: titor de filosofía con IA

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Fotosíntese: o proceso que usan as plantas para producir alimento.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Escolle calquera tema e enfróntate a un quiz enfocado de 10 preguntas de opción múltiple. Respondes unha pregunta cada vez, recibes comentarios instantáneos e rematas cunha puntuación e unha revisión.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Escolle calquera tema e enfróntate nun debate real. Escolle un lado, acepta o desafío e aprende a crear argumentos mellores.

entries.source: Pick review targets
entries.value: Escolle obxectivos de repaso

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, open the matching public mode, paste or adapt one starter prompt, then ask for a check, quiz, flashcard, or next-step review.
entries.value: Escolle primeiro a tarefa de aprendizaxe, abre o modo público correspondente, pega ou adapta un prompt inicial e despois pide unha comprobación, cuestionario, tarxeta ou repaso do seguinte paso.

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, then jump into the right public guest mode, starter prompt, study path, or guide without hunting through a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Escolle primeiro a tarefa de aprendizaxe e despois salta ao modo público de convidado, prompt inicial, ruta de estudo ou guía axeitados sen rebuscar nun chatbot xenérico.

entries.value: Escolle o modo que coincide coa tarefa antes de escribir un prompt.

entries.value: Coloca elementos, fai vívidas as imaxes, percorre a ruta e despois fai un cuestionario de recordo.

entries.value: Sitúame neste tempo e lugar. Etiqueta os feitos documentados por separado da simulación plausible e pregunta que observo.

entries.source: Place vivid cues
entries.value: Coloca pistas vívidas

entries.value: Explicacións en linguaxe clara

entries.value: Planifica e realiza sesións rápidas de repaso que fortalecen a memoria a longo prazo.

entries.value: Planifica o repaso de exames, xera cuestionarios, crea tarxetas, programa repaso espazado e mantén a motivación realista con modos enfocados de aprendizaxe con IA.

entries.source: Practise saying it
entries.value: Practica dicilo

entries.source: Predict grades and plan score targets
entries.value: Predí notas e planifica obxectivos de puntuación

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking for help.
entries.value: Predí que debería facer o código ou os datos antes de pedir axuda.

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking.
entries.value: Predí que debería facer o código ou os datos antes de preguntar.

entries.source: Predict, explain, test mentally or safely, and reflect on evidence.
entries.value: Predí, explica, proba mentalmente ou con seguridade e reflexiona sobre as evidencias.

entries.source: Prefer lesson blocks, maps, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, and concise coach prompts over free-form lecture.
entries.value: Prefire bloques de lección, mapas, simulacións, pares de contraste, rúbricas e prompts concisos de adestrador fronte a unha clase libre.

entries.source: Prepare a deep work session with a clear outcome, constraints, focus rules, review checkpoint, and fallback plan.
entries.value: Prepara unha sesión de traballo profundo cun resultado claro, restricións, regras de concentración, punto de revisión e plan alternativo.

entries.source: Prepare clear forum questions, replies, summaries, and follow-up requests that make student discussions more useful.
entries.value: Prepara preguntas de foro claras, respostas, resumos e solicitudes de seguimento que fagan máis útiles as conversas entre estudantes.

entries.source: Prepare for an exam
entries.value: Prepárate para un exame

entries.source: Prepare for an exam with active recall
entries.value: Prepárate para un exame con recordo activo

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning
entries.value: Prepárate para preguntas orais

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning.
entries.value: Prepárate para preguntas orais.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Prepárate para entrevistas escolares, de prácticas, de traballo ou de bolsa con preguntas realistas e comentarios útiles.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: Prepara estudantes para exames orais mediante preguntas realistas.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Prepara discursos, presentacións, entrevistas ou exames orais con prompts, control do tempo e comentarios sobre a estrutura.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Prepara recursos de estudo para compañeiros de clase ou un grupo: resumos, ligazóns, apuntamentos, explicacións e orientación de uso.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Os cursos preparados, vídeos e exercicios son máis fortes cando o estudante coñece a secuencia do tema.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Presenta un argumento, agarda a refutación, identifica puntos febles e fortalece o razoamento do estudante.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Presenta evidencias, pide decisións, revela consecuencias e pecha cos principios.

entries.source: Press facts
entries.value: Feitos de prensa

entries.source: Primary audience
entries.value: Público principal

entries.source: Primary homepage citation
entries.value: Cita principal da páxina de inicio

entries.source: Primary navigation
entries.value: Navegación principal

entries.source: Principles
entries.value: Principios

entries.source: Prioritize assignments
entries.value: Priorizar tarefas

entries.source: Prioritize by urgency and effort, break tasks down, and update status.
entries.value: Prioriza por urxencia e esforzo, divide tarefas e actualiza o estado.

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: Prioriza temas

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioriza temas.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Prioriza, programa, engade práctica e repaso, e despois axusta segundo cambie o progreso.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Prioriza, reduce tarefas demasiado grandes, rastrexa o progreso e pecha cun repaso.

entries.source: Privacy
entries.value: Privacidade

entries.source: Privacy policy
entries.value: Política de privacidade

entries.source: Privacy Policy
entries.value: Política de privacidade

entries.source: Privacy Policy | inspir
entries.value: Política de privacidade | inspir

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Os URLs de chats privados gardados non aparecen no mapa do sitio e non se inclúen en llms.txt, llms-full.txt nin no catálogo JSON de contido de IA.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: A titoría privada é potente, pero non está dispoñible por igual. Unha plataforma pública gratuíta de aprendizaxe con IA pode axudar a reducir esa fenda de acceso dando a máis persoas un primeiro lugar paciente para aprender.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: A titoría privada é potente, pero está distribuída de forma desigual. inspir usa a IA para ampliar o acceso mantendo activo o estudante: pistas antes de respostas, preguntas antes de clases e práctica despois da explicación.

entries.value: Enfoque de produto

entries.value: panel de progreso

entries.value: Panel de progreso

entries.source: progress summary
entries.value: resumo de progreso

entries.source: Prohibited Uses
entries.value: Usos prohibidos

entries.source: Project Coach
entries.value: Titor de proxectos

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: O modo de aprendizaxe con IA Project Coach é unha maneira centrada de usar a IA para aprender en vez de recoller respostas pasivamente. O modo está construído arredor dunha tarefa concreta: planificar un proxecto escolar, creativo, de programación ou persoal con alcance, fitos, bloqueos e seguintes accións.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Modo de aprendizaxe con IA Project Coach: guía práctica

entries.value: Prompts e bucle de estudo de Project Coach
